# airflow_connection (Data Source)

Fetches an existing Airflow connection. The password is never returned by the API and is not exposed here.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "airflow_connection" "example" {
  connection_id = "example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `connection_id` (String) The connection ID.

### Read-Only

- `conn_type` (String) The connection type.
- `description` (String) The connection description.
- `extra` (String) The connection extra field. Secret-like values may be masked by Airflow.
- `host` (String) The connection host.
- `id` (String) The connection ID.
- `login` (String) The connection login.
- `port` (Number) The connection port.
- `schema` (String) The connection schema.
- `team_name` (String) Team name (Airflow 3 multi-team deployments).
